name: PETracker Pro - Professional Engineer License Compliance
concept: AI-powered Professional Engineer license compliance platform. Tracks PE licenses across 50 states, manages continuing education requirements, and automates NCEES record updates for multi-state practice.
target_market: Engineering firms with multi-state operations (3K firms) and individual PEs
business_model: B2C - $29/mo or $290/year, B2B - $350/mo small firm, $1,000/mo large firm + $8/PE/mo

market_size.serviceable_addressable_market: 300K PEs with multi-state licenses or multi-state projects

practice_blocking_urgency.impact: Firm liability, $50K-500K/day project delays for infrastructure, immediate removal from projects

ai_advantage: State board monitoring: AI scrapes 50+ state engineering boards for license status, disciplinary actions, rule changes
CE requirement tracker: LLM parses each state's PDH/CEU requirements and tracks completion
NCEES record management: Auto-updates NCEES records for license comity/reciprocity
Renewal automation: Generates state-specific renewal applications from existing data
competitive_advantage: 50-state engineering board database with real-time monitoring
NCEES record integration and API access
State-specific CE requirement parsing (50 states = complexity)
primary_risks: State board website scraping challenges (anti-bot measures)
Individuals may rely on firms to pay
